overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt jogging through a forested mountain valley at night. The character travels along a dirt path from rocky woodland through dense forest, opening to a valley vista, and finally alongside a stream with wooden steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with wooden debris

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging along a winding dirt path between rocky outcrops and grassy slopes

entered.detail: steep rocky outcrop rising beside the path
grass-covered hillside descending to the trail
broken wooden beams and debris scattered on the slope
dense evergreen trees covering the distant hills
dark silhouetted mountains visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Geralt jogging along a narrow dirt trail through a rocky forest valley. A wooden ruin structure sits on the right side of the path while rocky cliffs rise on the left, with pine forests and distant mountains visible ahead.

events.description: entering denser forest section with taller pine trees surrounding the path

agents.ego_description: continuing through the denser woodland corridor

entered.detail: tall pine trees crowding both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The path enters a denser section of pine forest where trees crowd closer to the trail, blocking much of the sky. The rocky cliffs and grassy slopes give way to thick woodland as Geralt continues jogging forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with tall grass clearings

events.description: forest opens up to reveal wide mountain valley vista
camera briefly dips into tall grass on the path edge

agents.ego_description: jogging through the open valley with expansive mountain views ahead

entered.detail: wide valley opening with distant mountain peaks visible
tall grass patches growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dense forest, the scene opens into a wide mountain valley with expansive views of distant peaks under the night sky. The path continues through areas of tall grass, and the camera briefly dips into the vegetation before rising again.

events.description: stream becomes visible flowing on the right side of the path
approaching wooden steps and footbridge over the stream

agents.ego_description: following the trail alongside the water toward the wooden crossing

entered.detail: narrow flowing waterway running parallel to the path
steep rock wall returning alongside the left side
wooden steps and bridge structure crossing the stream ahead

segments.scene_description: The path narrows again between a rocky cliff face on the left and a flowing stream on the right. Geralt continues toward a set of wooden steps and a footbridge that crosses the water ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rocky mountain valley that transitions from dense woodland into an expansive vista and finally toward a riverside crossing. It begins with Geralt jogging along a narrow dirt trail flanked by a wooden ruin and towering rocky cliffs. As he moves forward, the open terrain gives way to a dense pine forest where the trees crowd the path and obscure the night sky. The scene then opens into a wide valley with views of distant peaks, the camera dipping briefly into tall grass before the path narrows once more. Finally, the environment shifts to a corridor between a cliff face and a flowing stream, leading toward a set of wooden steps and a footbridge.
